description_long: This combat tactical vehicle features a boxy, armored body with a flat front and angular surfaces, designed for durability and protection. It is equipped with two large cylindrical launchers mounted on the roof, likely for missile or rocket deployment, and a central angular turret base. The vehicle has six robust, hexagonal wheels, suggesting enhanced off-road capability and stability. The windows are small and reinforced, providing limited but secure visibility for occupants. The exterior is finished in a solid brown color, with minimal surface detailing and no visible insignia or camouflage patterns. The overall design emphasizes function and protection, suitable for urban or tactical operations.
description: Armored combat vehicle with two large roof-mounted launchers, six hexagonal wheels, and a solid brown exterior.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat armored face, two cylindrical launchers on the roof, and a large central windshield.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the angled launcher assembly, two side doors, and three hexagonal wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back panel, the twin launchers from behind, and a small rear window.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the launcher, a single side door, and three wheels.
attribute_weapon_mounts: Two large cylindrical launcher mounts on the roof, positioned side by side at the rear half of the vehicle.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with flat, angular panels covering all sides, including reinforced doors and small, protected windows. No visible reactive or modular panels.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: None visible; exterior is a solid brown color.
attribute_tire_type: Six hexagonal wheels with visible off-road tread pattern; appear reinforced for tactical use.
